scenarios.name: Baseline – 4 nodes
scenarios.description: Original 4 Wellington locations used in all initial demos

scenarios.name: Medium – 12 nodes
scenarios.description: 12 Wellington CBD and inner-suburb locations with a denser edge network for load testing

scenarios.name: Stress – 200 nodes
scenarios.description: 200 nodes sampled from actual Wellington road endpoints (seed=42, tight CBD bbox), 285 edges to 1–3 nearest neighbours.
